sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36002" key="e)nofqalmia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνοφθαλμ-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n36002.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cast longing eyes upon,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπ-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
